title: MasterClass Cast Aluminium Oval Casserole Dish, 30cm, 6L, Gift Boxed
features: EXTREMELY LIGHTWEIGHT- Elevate your cooking with our oval cast aluminium casserole dish. This casserole dish is made of cast aluminium, which is lighter than cast iron but perfect for those recipes which state "use a heavy base dish".

HOB TO OVEN TO TABLE SAFE- Our 6L casserole dish is designed for family meals and entertaining. Its stainless steel base makes it safe for any heat source, including induction, allowing you to prepare slow-cooked casseroles and stews -and serve your meals in it as well.

UNIQUE HELPFUL FEATURES- This casserole dish is PFAS and PFOA-free. It comes with a straining and self-basting lid and an easy gravy-pouring spout that prevents drips and mess. This sets includes our anti-slip, heat resistant silicone grippers for use on the handles and knob.

BEST IN CLASS NON-STICK SURFACE- Enjoy cooking with our undisputed non-stick coating, which ensures easy food release and makes it dishwasher-safe for quick clean-up, lifetime guarantee (5-year guarantee on the non-stick).
IDEAL FOR A RANGE OF OVEN-COOKED AND HOB-COOKED MEALS- Our casserole dish allows you to prepare hearty casseroles, tender roasts, and bread easily.
description: From the manufacturer More Information Capacity: 6 litres Dimensions (with handles): 40 x 27.5 x 22cm Oven safe to 200°C (392°F) Suitable for all hobs (including induction) MasterClass Black Oval Cast Aluminium Casserole Dish, 6L Transform your Cooking Elevate your cooking with the 6L oval cast aluminium casserole dish from MasterClass. This robust dish is crafted from premium aluminium, known for its lightweight feel and excellent heat conductivity. It’s finished with a double layer of scratch-resistant, non-stick coating for lasting durability. Featuring a drip-free pouring lip, a self-basting lid, and a built-in strainer. A reliable kitchen essential that delivers even, consistent cooking, perfect for everything from rich stews to tender casseroles. Cleanup is easy also. Ultimate Convenience Designed with a drip-free pouring lip for mess-free serving, a self-basting lid that locks in moisture and flavour, and a built-in strainer for easy draining, no need for extra tools or cleanup. Non-stick Coating The speckled grey interior stands out and serves a purpose, it’s a double-layered, scratch-resistant non-stick coating that prevents food from sticking and protects the casserole dish. A Healthy Choice The scratch-resistant, non-stick coating lets you fry with less oil, making your meals healthier and just as tasty. Fry ingredients easier whilst getting great results every time.
